What We Do

Full-Service
Tile & Marble

01
🛁
Bathroom Renovation
Complete tile work — floors, walls, showers, niches, and custom features. We handle demo through final grout seal.
02
🚿
Shower & Wet Areas
Waterproofing, precision tile setting, mosaic floors, built-in niches, and benches. Flawless from every angle.
03
🍳
Kitchen & Backsplash
Handcrafted backsplash installations and kitchen floors that become the centerpiece of any kitchen.
04
🪨
Natural Stone & Marble
Marble, travertine, slate, and limestone — supply, cutting, installation, sealing, and long-term care.
05
🏠
Flooring
Large-format porcelain, natural stone, and mosaic floors for living areas, entryways, patios, and beyond.
06
🏢
Commercial Projects
Restaurants, hotels, offices, retail. Any scale — on your schedule, on budget, with zero shortcuts.
How It Works

Simple Process,
Perfect Results

1
Free Consultation
We come to you or you visit our showroom. We measure, listen, and walk you through every option that fits your vision and budget.
2
Visualize Your Space
Use our Roomvo visualizer to see exactly how your chosen tile will look on your real floors and walls before we start.
3
Master Installation
Our licensed crew handles everything — surface prep, waterproofing, precision tile setting, grouting, and sealing. Done right, to code.
4
Final Walkthrough
We walk through together before any final payment. Your complete satisfaction is the only way we close a project.
The Crew

Master Installers

Our team is obsessed with getting every grout line, every transition, every single joint exactly right.
